title: ASR Outdoor AMERICAN EAGLE FLAG Pocket Knife Folding Blade Patriotic USA 8"
description:
Show your patriotic spirit with the ASR Outdoor Eagle Head Collectible Folding Pocket Knife. Featuring a detailed bald eagle and American flag handle design, this back lock folding knife combines collectible appeal with everyday utility. The durable steel blade measures approximately 3 inches long and opens to an overall length of 8 inches, while folding down to a compact 5 inches for convenient carrying and storage. An ergonomic handle provides a comfortable grip, and the included decorative eagle-themed gift box makes this knife an excellent choice for collectors, outdoor enthusiasts, campers, hunters and patriotic gift giving.

ASR Outdoor AMERICAN EAGLE FLAG Pocket Knife Folding Blade Patriotic USA 8"
Celebrate American pride and outdoor adventure with the ASR Outdoor Eagle Head Collectible Folding Pocket Knife. Featuring a striking bald eagle and American flag design on the handle, this folding knife makes a unique addition to knife collections, display cases and outdoor gear.

Constructed with a durable steel blade measuring approximately 3 inches in length, this pocket knife is equipped with a reliable back lock mechanism that helps keep the blade securely open during use. The knife measures approximately 8 inches overall when open and folds down to about 5 inches, providing a compact size for carrying in a pocket, backpack or gear bag.

The ergonomic handle is designed for a comfortable grip, making the knife suitable for camping, hiking, hunting and general outdoor tasks. When not in use, the knife can be displayed in the included decorative gift box featuring eagle artwork, making it an excellent gift for collectors, outdoor enthusiasts and patriots alike.

Combining practical functionality with eye-catching patriotic styling, this collectible folding knife is a great addition to any outdoor gear collection.
Key Features
  • PATRIOTIC EAGLE DESIGN - Features detailed bald eagle artwork paired with an American flag motif for a distinctive collectible appearance
  • DURABLE STEEL BLADE - Approximately 3-inch steel blade provides dependable cutting performance for outdoor and everyday tasks
  • SECURE BACK LOCK MECHANISM - Reliable locking design helps keep the blade open during use for added confidence
  • COMPACT FOLDING SIZE - Folds to approximately 5 inches for convenient carrying in a pocket, backpack or gear bag
  • DECORATIVE GIFT BOX INCLUDED - Comes packaged in an eagle-themed display box ideal for gifting and collection display
Specifications
MPN: ASROPKEAG8IN
UPC: 060886972716
Knife Type: Folding Pocket Knife
Lock Type: Back Lock
Intended Use: Collecting, Camping, Hiking, Outdoor Use
The ASR Outdoor Eagle Head Folding Pocket Knife blends collectible design with practical utility. Showcasing a detailed bald eagle and American flag handle graphic, this folding knife is ideal for display, collecting and outdoor recreation.

Featuring a durable 3-inch steel blade and dependable back lock mechanism, the knife opens to approximately 8 inches overall and folds to about 5 inches for convenient transport. The comfortable ergonomic handle promotes a secure grip, while the included eagle-themed presentation box provides an attractive display option. A great gift choice for knife collectors, campers, hunters and outdoor enthusiasts.
